name: Squirrel Road Kill Brunswick Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin the squirrel and remove internal organs.
2. Cut the head off and chop the squirrel into pieces.
3. Sauté the squirrel and pork in 1/4 cup shortening until light brown.
4. Remove the mixture from the pan.
5. Brown the squirrel and pork fat with chopped onions (1/2 cup).
6. Add quartered tomatoes, lima beans, hot water, cayenne, Worcestershire sauce, and toasted bread crumbs to the stewing pot.
7. Simmer until the squirrel and pork are tender.
8. Add corn and simmer until completely tender. Serve.
